title: Macfolio - Interactive Portfolio
description: A macOS-inspired portfolio with draggable windows, CLI terminal, and modular apps to showcase projects and skills.

title: Productivity Dashboard
description: A multi-feature productivity app with To-Do, Planner, Pomodoro Timer, Notes, and real-time weather integration.

title: Spotify UI Clone
description: A frontend clone of Spotify's homepage focusing on layout design, responsiveness, and visual accuracy using modern CSS techniques.
